form.formComment: At the latest run rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind World Hero carrying 60.5kg at $2.90. The start before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at Sha Tin on March 1 over 1200m, 5 len behind Pakistan Legacy with 53.5kg at $27. Made headway last time. Terrific chance to find winning form.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start led but faded 2nd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Notthesillyone carrying 60kg at $3.90. The start before that raced on the pace when 2nd of 12 at this track on February 11 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Bunta Baby carrying 60kg at $3.30. Genuine type who gets his chance.
